dict.string: This app needs access to your camera to scan barcodes and take photos of products.

Push Price uses your location to show nearby grocery stores and deals, and — when Travel Mode is on — to alert you about relevant offers while you travel. For example, we use your location to sort Nearby Stores by distance and to notify you when you pass a store with discounts on your favorite items.

Push Price needs background location access only when Travel Mode is enabled, so we can notify you about nearby store deals while you travel. For example, if you pass a store offering a discount on an item you saved, we can send you an alert.

Push Price uses your location to show nearby grocery stores and deals while you use the app. For example, when you open Nearby Stores, we use your current location to sort stores by distance from you.
This app needs access to your photo library to select product images.
This app needs access to notifications to keep you updated with important alerts and messages.
